details.test: Task 1: Save a night-shift cardiology RN job near Chicago with salary >= 80000
Task 2: Create a candidate profile and set PT alerts for Boston and Providence
Task 3: Apply to job with higher PTO among first two search results
Task 4: Create and save a remote, part-time medical billing search
Task 5: Begin application and reach review step (multi-step flow)
Task 6: Copy link for newest job at Main Hospital Campus via map flow
Task 7: Save the Nursing Benefits Overview to My Resources
Task 8: Register for a pharmacist virtual hiring event on March 15, 2025
Task 9: Shortlist three jobs and view them in Saved Jobs
